meta.title: Function calling Llama 2
meta.description:
fLlama extends Llama 2 to support function calling. Now you can call APIs like Bing or Google using the Llama 2 language model.

**Out-of-the-box Llama with Function-calling**
Llama 7b (free), 13b, 70B and Code-Llama-34b - fine-tuned for function calling: https://huggingface.co/Trelis/Llama-2-13b-chat-hf-function-calling-v2

*Basic Fine-tuning Notebook for Llama 2 (FREE)*
Access the Google Colab script here: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1uMSS1o_8YOPyG1X_4k6ENEE3kJfBGGhH?usp=sharing

*ADVANCED Training Notebook for Structured Responses (PAID)*
- Includes a prompt loss-mask and stop token for improved performance.
Request access here: https://buy.stripe.com/5kAfZK6xT2Hxg7e8wW

*Advanced Fine-tuning Repo Access*
Learn More: https://trelis.com/advanced-fine-tuning-scripts/
1. Fine-tuning notebook for tone/style
2. Fine-tuning notebook for structured responses
3. Fine-tuning discussion forum.

*Function Calling Dataset*
- Function calling dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Trelis/function_calling_extended

*Basic Google Colab Chatbot with function calling (FREE)*
- Search Bing.
- Upload pdf or text files for analysis.
- Get access [here](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1u8x41Jx8WWtI-nzHOgqTxkS3Q_lcjaSX?usp=sharing).

0:00 Llama 2 with function calling
1:00 Running Llama in a free colab notebook
1:15 Run Llama on a GPU in Colab
1:55 Connect Google Drive to Colab
2:15 Running Llama with bitsandbytes in quantised form
3:05 Streaming Llama 2 in Google Colab
3:30 How do I call functions with Llama 2?
5:05 Extending Llama context with RoPE scaling
